bead.title: drift: re-record helix-concerns cast with area-labeled review finding
bead.description:
<context-digest>
<principles>Design for Change В· Design for Simplicity В· Validate Your Work В· Make Intent Explicit В· Prefer Reversible Decisions</principles>
<concerns>hugo-hextra | demo-asciinema | e2e-playwright</concerns>
<practices>Define the site's target audience and what content they need В· Theme version: Hextra v0.12.1 вЂ” pinned in website/go.mod В· Identify which workflows need demo reels вЂ” prioritize the "first 5 minutes" experience В· Current demos: helix-quickstart (full lifecycle), helix-concerns (drift detection), helix-evolve (requirement threading), helix-experiment (metric-driven optimization) В· Identify all user-facing pages and workflows that need testing В· Test location: website/e2e/microsite.spec.ts</practices>
<adrs>ADR-001 HELIX Supervisory Control Model вЂ” Supervision must remain live to concurrent local operator activity. A running helix-run session must treat tracker and governing-artifact changes as new control input at safe boundaries. It may not assume that the selected issue is still valid at claim time or close time just because it was valid earlier in the loop. Why: HELIX must preserve bounded execution, authority order, tracker-first work management, and direct interactive operation. It must also reduce orchestration burden by autonomously selecting the least-powerful sufficient next action when authority is available. В· ADR-002 HELIX Tracker Write Safety Model вЂ” The tracker will not pretend to provide arbitrary multi-writer transactional semantics. Instead, it will define the supported local execution model, require explicit detection or prevention of silent lost updates, and make malformed tracker state a surfaced failure rather than something the rest of HELIX must guess around. Why: HELIX needs a conservative local tracker that is safe enough for agent-driven issue refinement and concurrent local supervision. The tracker must surface malformed state explicitly, define what concurrency/conflict guarantees are supported, and make metadata mutation available through first-class commands instead of direct file edits.</adrs>
<governing>docs/demos/helix-concerns/recordings/helix-concerns-20260406-180259.cast вЂ” {"version": 2, "width": 100, "height": 30, "timestamp": 1775498579, "env": {"SHELL": "/bin/bash", "TERM": "xterm-256color"}, "title": "HELIX Concerns: Preventing Technology Drift"} [0.005226, "o", "

NOT Node.js, NOT ESLint, NOT Vitest.

"] [5.015934, "o", "в”Ђв”Ђ docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md в”Ђв”Ђ
"] [5.016866, "o", "# Project Concerns

## Active Concerns
- typescript-bun (tech-stack)

## Area Labels

| Label | Applies to |
|-------|-----------|
| all | Every bead |
| api | HTTP server, endpoints |

## Project Overrides

### typescript-bun
- HTTP framework: raw Bun.serve() вЂ” no Express, no Fastify
- Test framework: bun:test вЂ” do not use Vitest or Jest"] [5.016899, "o", "
- Linter/formatter: Biome вЂ” do not use ESLint or Prettier

"] [41.497937, "o", "---
id: prd
title: Hello-Bun HTTP Server
version: 0.1.0
status: draft
date: 2026-04-06
---

# Product Requirements Document

## Overview

A minimal HTTP server built with Bun that exposes a health-check endpoint for
liveness probing and uptime monitoring.

## Goals

"] [41.497963, "o", "- Demonstrate a working Bun HTTP server with a typed JSON response.
- Provide a /health endpoint suitable for container health checks.

## Non-Goals

- Authentication, routing libraries, or middleware frameworks.
- Persistent storage or external service calls.

"] [41.498181, "o", "...

| tests/health.test.ts | 4 tests via bun:test covering status, content-type, body shape, and 404s |

Tests: 4 pass, 0 fail. Tracker issue hello-bun-895585d8 marked closed.

"] [106.737729, "o", "в”Ђв”Ђ tests/drift.test.ts в”Ђв”Ђ
"] [106.738707, "o", "// Accidentally using Vitest instead of bun:test
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'

describe('drift example', () => {
 it('should use vitest', () => {
 expect(1 + 1).toBe(2)
 })
})
"] [106.738884, "o", "...

"] [108.740381, "o", "This violates the typescript-bun concern:
 вњ— imports from 'vitest' вЂ” should be 'bun:test'

"] [110.752377, "o", "
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
 ACT 5: Review вЂ” Agent Detects Concern Drift
"] [110.75243, "o", "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

"] [112.755427, "o", "$ ddx agent run --text "Read docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md first вЂ” it declares typescript-bun.

Review..."

"] [129.212606, "o", "Tracker issue created: hello-bun-c8fc82bc

---

Summary

| File | Line | Violation |
|------|------|-----------|
| tests/drift.test.ts | 2 | import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest' вЂ” must use bun:test |

No other files changed in the last commit. The only drift is the Vitest import. Fix: replace the import with import { describe, it, expect } from 'bun:test' (and remove vitest from package.json if it was added).

"] [132.213926, "o", "
The agent should have flagged tests/drift.test.ts
for importing from 'vitest' instead of 'bun:test'.

Tracker (should include drift finding):
"] [132.213992, "o", "$ ddx bead list
"] [132.224084, "o", "hello-bun-895585d8 closed P1 Implement /health endpoint per PRD [helix,phase:build,area:api]
hello-bun-c8fc82bc open P0 drift: tests/drift.test.ts imports vitest instead of bun:test [helix,phase:build,review-finding]
"] [132.225351, "o", "
"] [135.228146, "o", "
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
 Demo Complete!
"] [135.228194, "o", "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

"] [137.229703, "o", "What you just saw:
 1. Concerns declared: typescript-bun (Bun, Biome, bun:test)
 2. Agent reads concerns and uses the correct tools
 3. Deliberate drift introduced (vitest import)
 4. Review catches the drift via concern-aware review

"] [137.229743, "o", "Concerns prevent the technology drift that happens when
agents (or developers) reach for familiar tools instead
of the project's declared stack.

"]</governing>
</context-digest>

Explicit omission rationale: Follow-on demo refresh bead was created directly during review cleanup and intentionally omits a full context digest until the next polish/triage pass rewrites it with current concern context.

Implementation follow-on from helix-438c8a07. The checked-in helix-concerns asciinema recording still shows the pre-contract review finding bead without any area:* label, even after the demo prompt and replay fixture were updated. Re-record the demo (or otherwise refresh the published cast artifact) so the public recording matches the current fresh-eyes review contract.
bead.acceptance: A checked-in helix-concerns .cast recording shows the drift finding bead with at least one scope-appropriate area:* label, and the recording remains valid JSON lines.
